allow: PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path "c:\\code1\\stock-notification"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "c:\\code1\\stock-notification" -Force | Out-Null }; if \(-not \(Test-Path "c:\\code1\\stock-notification\\src"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "c:\\code1\\stock-notification\\src" -Force | Out-Null }; "ok")

PowerShell($dirs = @\("backend","frontend","frontend\\src","terraform","scripts"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "c:\\code1\\stock-notification\\$d" -Force | Out-Null }; "ok")
